headline: Palantir Falls 5% While Tech Stocks Climb: Valuation Concerns and UK Scrutiny Weigh on the AI Darling
summary: Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ:PLTR) shares are bucking the broader tech rally today, declining 5% to $143. That’s a notable disconnect from the NASDAQ 100, as the Invesco QQQ Trust (NASDAQ:QQQ) is up 3% on the session. The paradox here is real. Palantir posted some of the most impressive growth numbers in enterprise software last quarter, yet ...
